refined_caption: The hospital nursing station is empty and unstaffed, with only two chairs and a desk present. There is no medical personnel in sight.
complaint_description: I visited my family member at the hospital and was shocked to see the nursing station completely empty and unstaffed. This is concerning as it may affect the quality of care provided to patients. I hope the hospital takes immediate action to address this issue.
voice_text: I just saw the nursing station and there's no one there, it's completely empty and unstaffed, I'm really worried about the care my family member is getting.
